visual_description: A man in a white shirt and dark tie walks through a glass door into a dimly lit office. He is followed by another man in a blue uniform. The man in the white shirt turns his head to look back as he enters.
audio_description: The sound of footsteps on a hard floor is heard, followed by a low, sustained, and ominous musical note.
